Bed Bug Control in Maize, KS

Shaw's Pest Control eliminates bed bug infestations from homes and businesses in Maize, Kansas. Process-based treatment with proven results.

Get a Free Estimate ☎ (316) 251-9461

Bed Bug Control in Maize, Kansas

Bed bugs were nearly eradicated in the U.S. by the 1970s, but returned to epidemic levels around 2000 and haven't let up since. If you're dealing with bed bugs in your Maize home, you're not alone — and you need a plan, not just a spray.

Shaw's Pest Control has partnered with hundreds of customers to eliminate bed bug problems. We treat it as a process, not a single event. That means good communication, customer cooperation on preparation, and follow-through until the problem is resolved. Sixty percent of people don't react to bites, which can make early detection difficult — but our team is trained to find and treat even hidden infestations.

Contact us for a free estimate on bed bug treatment for your Maize property.

Serving Maize Since 1987

Maize is a Sedgwick County community that Shaw's Pest Control has been proud to serve for decades. As a family-owned company based in the same region, we know the pest challenges that Maize homeowners and businesses face.
